== RAITENHASLACH ==

[[File:Band09_chunk004_p013_img001.jpg|thumb|RAITENHASLACH]]

[[File:Band09_chunk004_p013_img002.jpg|thumb|Entscheidung der Brüder für das Mönchtum]]

[[File:Band09_chunk004_p013_img003.jpg|thumb]]

[[File:Band09_chunk004_p013_img004.jpg|thumb|Aufruf zum Kreuzzug]]

[[File:Band09_chunk004_p013_img005.jpg|thumb|Aufruf zum Kreuzzug]]

[[File:Band09_chunk004_p013_img006.jpg|thumb]]

[[File:Band09_chunk004_p013_img007.jpg|thumb|Bekehrung Wilhelms von Aquitanier]]

[[File:Band09_chunk004_p013_img008.jpg|thumb]]

[[File:Band09_chunk004_p013_img009.jpg|thumb]]

[[File:Band09_chunk004_p013_img010.jpg|thumb]]

[[File:Band09_chunk004_p013_img011.jpg|thumb]]

[[File:Band09_chunk004_p013_img012.jpg|thumb]]

[[File:Band09_chunk004_p013_img013.jpg|thumb]]

[[File:Band09_chunk004_p013_img014.jpg|thumb]]

[[File:Band09_chunk004_p013_img015.jpg|thumb]]

[[File:Band09_chunk004_p013_img016.jpg|thumb]]

[[File:Band09_chunk004_p013_img017.jpg|thumb|Bernhard als geistiger Führer]]
